item.title: Speed Up Your Company Search with AI 🔍 • Use AI tools to generate a list of companies. • Refine the list by industry and company size. • Target companies with recent job postings. • Prioritize those aligning with your values. • Leverage LinkedIn to research employee reviews. What AI prompts will you use to identify your top 25 companies? #jobsearch #ai #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Speed Up Your Company Search with AI 🔍 • Use AI tools to generate a list of companies. • Refine the list by industry and company size. • Target companies with recent job postings. • Prioritize those aligning with your values. • Leverage LinkedIn to research employee reviews. What AI prompts will you use to identify your top 25 companies? #jobsearch #ai #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
